items.claim: Elliot's versatility at range will be a problem for Demon Hands.
items.quote: At range, I think Elliot's versatility is going to be more of a problem.

items.claim: Demon Hands is more dangerous than Elliot in the pocket.
items.quote: I think if it gets into the pocket, that's where Demon Hands is going to start unloading on him.

items.claim: Demon Hands possesses high-level submission skills, specifically leg locks.
items.quote: I think he's going to find out really quickly that Demon Hands also has some nasty submissions, especially those leg locks.

items.claim: Anna Melisano is a superior striker compared to Danni Barba.
items.quote: So Melisano is the better striker.

items.claim: Danni Barba is a superior grappler compared to Anna Melisano.
items.quote: She's much much better on the ground.

items.claim: R.J. Harris has a significant physical advantage over Elvin Hines due to his height and reach.
items.quote: I'm going to go with the bigger guy. He's 6'6 with a 80 in reach. Hines is 6'2 with a 74 in reach.

items.claim: Elden Cora possesses elite boxing, timing, and footwork.
items.quote: Cory has got such good boxing, amazing timing, good footwork, good shot placement.

items.claim: Stewart Nicole leaves his chin exposed when throwing strikes.
items.quote: Opens up his chin whenever he throws.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez Jr. is vulnerable to takedowns immediately following his right high kick.
items.quote: he knows right off of that high kick, Rodriguez is going to throw those hooks, and that could be an opening for Franco to shoot a takedown.

items.claim: Felipe Franco has faster hands than Levi Rodriguez Jr.
